{{Infobox group
| name = Akura Underlords
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Akura Underlords]] are young, purple-eyed individuals.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3">''Uncrowned'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Akura Underlords]] are a group within the [[Akura clan]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Five different [[Akura Underlords]] challenged [[Lindon]] to duels.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Underlords]] were not bothered by the cultist priest's attack.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
